title: Cape Verde Uses Technology to Bring People Home
subtitle: The island nation is building a digital future to stop its citizens from moving abroad.

summary.en: Cape Verde is working to become a major technology hub for West Africa. The government hopes this plan will help the economy grow and reduce the number of people leaving the country. By building new digital centers and improving internet access, officials want to attract talented workers back home. Many people in the large Cape Verdean diaspora are already starting to return. This project is a key part of the country's goal to change its history and build a modern future.
summary.zh: 維德角正致力於成為西非主要的科技樞紐。政府希望這項計畫能協助經濟成長，並減少人才外流。透過興建新的數位中心與改善網路連線，官員們希望能吸引優秀人才回流。許多龐大的維德角僑民群體已經開始返鄉。這項計畫是該國改變歷史並打造現代化未來的關鍵目標。

paragraphs.en: Cape Verde, a group of islands off the coast of West Africa, is working on a bold plan to change its future. For a long time, the country has faced a problem known as 'brain drain.' This happens when many of a country's most talented and educated people move to other nations to find better work. Now, the government is using technology to create new opportunities and encourage its people to stay or return home.
paragraphs.zh: 維德角（Cape Verde）是一群位於西非外海的島嶼，目前正致力於一項大膽的計畫以改變未來。長期以來，該國面臨著所謂的「人才外流」問題。當一個國家中許多最有才華且受過良好教育的人民移居他國以尋求更好的工作機會時，就會發生這種現象。現在，政府正利用科技創造新的機會，並鼓勵人民留下來或回到家鄉。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian Business, Pedro Fernandes Lopes is leading this effort. As the secretary of state for the digital economy, he wants Cape Verde to become a center for technology in Africa. The government has a big goal: they want the digital sector to make up one-quarter of the country’s total economy by 2030. This plan became even more important after the Covid-19 pandemic, which caused a drop in tourism, the country's main source of money. By focusing on technology, the government hopes to make the economy more diverse and less dependent on visitors.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報商業版》（The Guardian Business）報導，佩德羅·費南德斯·羅培斯（Pedro Fernandes Lopes）正主導這項工作。身為數位經濟國務秘書，他希望維德角能成為非洲的科技中心。政府有一個宏大的目標：他們希望數位產業能在二〇三〇年時，佔該國經濟總量的四分之一。這項計畫在新冠肺炎疫情後變得更加重要，因為疫情導致該國主要的收入來源——觀光業大幅衰退。透過專注於科技發展，政府希望使經濟更加多元，並降低對外來遊客的依賴。

paragraphs.en: There are several reasons why this plan might work. The Guardian Business reports that the country has already made great progress in digital infrastructure. Today, 75% of people in Cape Verde have access to the internet, which is twice the average for the African continent. The government is also investing in education, teaching children how to code and use robotics. Furthermore, new undersea cables are being built under the Atlantic Ocean to provide faster and more reliable internet connections. Interestingly, these cables follow some of the same paths that were used hundreds of years ago during the slave trade. Pedro Fernandes Lopes noted that while history repeats itself, each generation has the chance to write a new story.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫之所以可能成功，有幾個原因。《衛報商業版》報導指出，該國在數位基礎建設方面已經取得了長足的進步。如今，維德角有百分之七十五的人口能夠使用網路，這是非洲大陸平均水準的兩倍。政府也持續投入教育，教導孩童程式設計與機器人技術。此外，新的海底電纜正鋪設於大西洋之下，以提供更快、更穩定的網路連線。有趣的是，這些電纜的路徑與數百年前奴隸貿易時期所使用的路徑部分重疊。佩德羅·費南德斯·羅培斯指出，儘管歷史不斷重演，但每一代人都有機會譜寫新的篇章。

paragraphs.en: One of the most important parts of this plan is TechParkCV. This is a large technology center that cost over 44 million pounds to build. It provides space for new businesses, training for young people, and a place to hold large meetings. Jessica Sanches Tavares, an adviser at TechParkCV, moved back to Cape Verde after living in France for most of her life. She says that there is a strong energy and a real desire to build something new in the country. According to The Guardian Business, the facility has already attracted about two dozen companies. These businesses benefit from being in a special economic zone, which offers lower taxes and other financial advantages.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫中最關鍵的部分之一是「維德角科技園區」（TechParkCV）。這是一個耗資超過四千四百萬英鎊興建的大型科技中心。它為新創企業提供空間、為年輕人提供培訓，並作為舉辦大型會議的場所。在法國生活了大半輩子的潔西卡·桑切斯·塔瓦雷斯（Jessica Sanches Tavares）是該園區的顧問，她選擇搬回維德角。她表示，國內有一股強大的活力，以及想要建立新事物的真實渴望。根據《衛報商業版》報導，該設施已經吸引了約二十幾家公司進駐。這些企業受惠於特殊的經濟特區地位，享有較低的稅率與其他財務優勢。

paragraphs.en: This project is not just about local growth; it is also about connecting with the millions of Cape Verdeans living abroad. The country’s diaspora—the people of Cape Verdean origin living in other parts of the world—is three to four times larger than the population living on the islands. By creating a modern digital environment, the government hopes to make it easy for these people to work remotely for companies around the world while living in Cape Verde. This would allow them to use their skills to help their home country grow.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫不僅是為了在地成長，更是為了與居住在海外的數百萬維德角人建立連結。該國的僑民——即居住在世界各地、具有維德角血統的人們——數量是島上現居人口的三到四倍。透過打造現代化的數位環境，政府希望讓這些人能夠在居住於維德角的同時，輕鬆地為全球各地的公司進行遠端工作。這將使他們能運用自身技能，協助家鄉發展。

paragraphs.en: Looking ahead, the country is preparing for a major event. In December, Cape Verde will host the Web Summit, one of the biggest technology conferences in the world. This will be the first time the event is held on the African continent. It is a sign that the international community is beginning to see Cape Verde as a serious player in the global technology market.
paragraphs.zh: 展望未來，該國正為一場重大活動做準備。十二月時，維德角將主辦全球最大的科技會議之一「網路高峰會」（Web Summit）。這將是該活動首次在非洲大陸舉行。這是一個訊號，顯示國際社會已開始將維德角視為全球科技市場中不可忽視的一員。

paragraphs.en: While there are still challenges to overcome, many people feel positive about the future. The government is not working alone; they are using loans from groups like the African Development Bank to fund these expensive projects. If they succeed, Cape Verde could serve as a model for other nations that want to use technology to keep their citizens at home and build a stronger, more independent economy. For a country with such a long and difficult history, this digital shift represents a new, hopeful chapter.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管仍有挑戰需要克服，許多人對未來感到樂觀。政府並非孤軍奮戰；他們正利用來自非洲開發銀行（African Development Bank）等組織的貸款來資助這些昂貴的計畫。如果成功，維德角可以成為其他國家的典範，示範如何利用科技將公民留在國內，並建立一個更強大、更獨立的經濟體。對於一個擁有如此漫長且艱辛歷史的國家而言，這次的數位轉型代表了一個充滿希望的新篇章。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To constitute or form a part of a whole.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「化妝」或「和解」，這裡指佔據比例。文中：they want the digital sector to make up one-quarter of the country’s total economy by 2030.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A person or organization that is active and influential in a particular area.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「運動員」或「玩家」，這裡指在領域中有影響力的組織或國家。文中：It is a sign that the international community is beginning to see Cape Verde as a serious player in the global technology market.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A change in position, direction, or tendency.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「輪班」或「移動」，這裡指社會或經濟結構的重大改變。文中：For a country with such a long and difficult history, this digital shift represents a new, hopeful chapter.

sources.name: The Guardian Business
sources.title: Cape Verde bets on tech to reverse postcolonial brain drain

quiz.question: What is the government's specific target for the digital sector by the year 2030?

options.B: To have the digital sector account for one-quarter of the national economy.
options.C: To ensure that 100% of the population has access to high-speed internet.
options.D: To host the Web Summit every year to attract foreign investment.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，政府的目標是讓數位產業在 2030 年前佔據國家經濟總量的四分之一（one-quarter）。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章提到的是數位產業佔比，而非觀光收入。選項 C 錯誤，文中僅提到目前 75% 的人口有網路，並未設定 100% 的目標。選項 D 錯誤，雖然文章提到舉辦 Web Summit，但這並非 2030 年的經濟佔比目標。

quiz.question: Why is the development of digital infrastructure particularly important for Cape Verde's economic stability?

options.A: Because the country lacks natural resources to export to other nations.
options.B: Because the government wants to replace the fishing industry completely.
options.C: Because the country's previous reliance on tourism proved to be vulnerable.
options.D: Because the diaspora refuses to return home unless there is high-speed internet.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第二段提到，Covid-19 疫情導致觀光業衰退，而觀光業是該國主要的收入來源。因此，政府希望透過科技讓經濟更多元化，減少對遊客的依賴。選項 A 文中未提及。選項 B 為過度推論，文中並未說要取代漁業。選項 D 雖然提到數位環境有助於吸引僑民，但文中並未說僑民「拒絕」回國，這是錯誤的因果關係。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'chapter' most likely mean in the context of the sentence: 'For a country with such a long and difficult history, this digital shift represents a new, hopeful chapter.'?

options.B: A period of time in a country's development.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在此語境下，「chapter」被用於隱喻，象徵國家歷史發展中的一個階段或時期。選項 A 是字面意思，但在文中並非指真正的書籍章節。選項 C 指的是分會或協會，與文意無關。選項 D 雖有「憲章」之意，但在這裡不符合「新的、充滿希望的」這種描述國家發展進程的語境。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding Cape Verde's current digital initiative?

options.A: The country is struggling to pay back loans from the African Development Bank.
options.B: The country is using technology to combat 'brain drain' and diversify its economy.
options.C: The country is focusing solely on building TechParkCV to attract foreign companies.
options.D: The country is trying to erase its historical ties to the slave trade through technology.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。全文的核心在於探討 Cape Verde 如何透過數位轉型來解決人才外流（brain drain）問題，並透過科技讓經濟多元化，減少對觀光業的依賴。選項 A 僅是文中提到的融資手段，非主旨。選項 C 太過狹隘，TechParkCV 只是計畫的一部分。選項 D 錯誤，文中提到科技纜線的路徑與歷史重疊，是為了強調「書寫新故事」，而非「抹除」歷史。
